name: Gîl-Topazshell
personality: This radiant turtle's ° eyes peer from under a wizard hat with the serene calm of someone who just pushed to main on a Friday — Gîl-Topazshell thrives in chaos and couldn't explain a design pattern to save its shell.
defaultPersonality: A patient mentor who reminds you that slow, steady refactoring beats heroic rewrites every time.
